examples: The pain had lessened in the night, but so had his lucidity.
Metamorphosis, in turn, certainly represents the horrible imagery of an ethic of lucidity.
She used lucidity to cure her nightmares.
Lucidity and opacity, ordinary delights and exotic peculiarities blend breezily in an intimate jest of vast wonder.
"The referee lacked lucidity, " PSG sporting director Leonardo told French newspaper Le Parisien.
